sqlite_consolidator.description: Segments conversations by topic, extracts facts, and stores embedded summaries for long-term memory retrieval.

dispatch.description: Monitors triaged tickets and dispatches notifications based on priority and content analysis.

zammad_bot.description: Polls Zammad for new tickets and runs the multi-stage AI triage pipeline.

reminder.description: Polls Zammad for open tickets that haven't been updated and sends a summary nudge to Discord.

agent_requirements._doc: Template and checklist for defining new agents. Not consumed by code.

required.class: Python class name — must extend Agent
required.module: Import path for the agent module (e.g. src.agents.dispatch_agent)
required.persona: Name of system persona in system_personas.json
required.schedule: Schedule config object, e.g. {"interval": 300} for seconds between deploy cycles

optional.action_history_limit: Recent actions injected into LLM context (default: 0 = disabled)
optional.service_bindings: Required services the agent depends on (e.g. ['zammad'])

checklist: 1. Create Agent subclass with deploy() implementation
2. Create or assign system persona in system_personas.json
3. Register agent class in main.py via agent_manager.register()
4. Define notification routing if agent sends alerts
5. Add entry to this file under 'agents'
6. Write unit tests — mock all external calls
7. Write integration test with step logging assertions
8. Add recipient mappings if agent sends user-targeted notifications
